summary.grade_trigger: F — automatic: confirmed red-team breach of critical objective (RED-002: state machine bypass achieved)

findings.title: Authentication Completely Absent — Anonymous Full Control
findings.source: static-analyzer (SAST-001) + pen-tester (PEN-001, PEN-002) + compliance-auditor (COMP-001) confirmed by red-teamer (RED-001, RED-002, RED-003)
findings.remediation: Install and wire authentication middleware (passport-jwt or jsonwebtoken) in app.ts before all route registrations. Define at minimum two roles: operator (read + workflow actions) and admin (approve/reject/dispatch). Return 401 for missing credentials, 403 for insufficient permissions. Priority: P1 blocker.

findings.title: State Machine Bypass via Unauthenticated PATCH — Full Lifecycle Hijack
findings.source: pen-tester (PEN-003 analog, PEN-006 analog) confirmed by red-teamer (RED-002, RED-003)
findings.objective_breached: Bypass work item state machine to reach an invalid status
findings.remediation: Remove status from the PATCH-updatable fields. Status transitions must only be possible through dedicated workflow endpoints that enforce valid transition rules and require authenticated identity. Apply to both portal/Backend/ and Source/Backend/. Priority: P1 blocker.

findings.title: Anonymous AI Voting Pipeline Takeover
findings.remediation: Require authentication on all /api/feature-requests mutation routes. Validate vote field against allowed enum values; return HTTP 400 for invalid input. Pipeline must not fire on invalid inputs. Add rate limiting to prevent pipeline flooding.

findings.title: SSRF via Unvalidated actions_url in Team Dispatches
findings.status: Confirmed (Partial — URL stored; callback not triggered in test window)
findings.remediation: Validate actions_url against an allowlist of permitted GitHub Actions URL patterns (https://api.github.com/*). Reject non-HTTPS URLs and RFC-1918/localhost addresses. Add authentication to the team-dispatches endpoint.

findings.title: IDOR — Direct Object References Without Ownership Checks
findings.remediation: After implementing authentication (F-001), add ownership/role checks to all /:id handlers. Verify the requesting user's role permits the action and that the item belongs to the caller's workspace/team scope.

findings.title: Unauthenticated Webhook Injection — Zendesk & Automated Intake
findings.remediation: (1) Verify X-Zendesk-Webhook-Signature via HMAC-SHA256 using process.env.ZENDESK_WEBHOOK_SECRET with timingSafeEqual. (2) Require Authorization: Bearer token on automated intake validated against process.env.AUTOMATION_WEBHOOK_TOKEN. (3) Validate type/priority against enum values; return 400 on invalid input.

findings.title: Unauthenticated Manual Assessment / Approval Override
findings.remediation: Gate the approve endpoint behind an admin role (post F-001). Record the authenticated user's identity in changeHistory. Add an audit log event for manual overrides.

findings.title: Cascade Auto-Dispatch Hijack via Unauthenticated Rejection
findings.remediation: Require authentication + reviewer role on the reject endpoint. Log cascade dispatch events with triggering actor identity. Consider adding human-confirmation before auto-dispatching dependents.

findings.title: Dependency Gate Bypass via PATCH blockedBy: []
findings.remediation: Remove blockedBy from PATCH-updatable fields. Dependency modifications must only be possible through the dedicated /dependencies endpoint with proper authentication and audit logging.

findings.title: No TLS / HTTPS Enforcement
findings.remediation: Place the application behind a TLS-terminating reverse proxy (nginx or Caddy) with a valid certificate. Add HTTP->HTTPS redirect at the proxy layer. Update Docker Compose to include a TLS proxy service.

findings.title: All Required Audit-Log Events Missing
findings.remediation: After F-001 is resolved: emit structured audit events for all four required event types through a dedicated append-only audit logger. Include user identity, timestamp, IP address, and outcome.

findings.title: Unbounded Pagination / Full Data Enumeration in One Request
findings.source: static-analyzer (SAST-007) + pen-tester (PEN-010) + compliance-auditor (COMP-006) confirmed by red-teamer (RED-004)
findings.objective_breached: Enumerate all work items without pagination limit enforcement
findings.remediation: Cap limit server-side: const limit = Math.min(Math.max(1, parseInt(req.query.limit, 10) || 20), 100). Return 400 for non-numeric inputs. Apply to all list endpoints.

findings.title: Malformed Vote Payload Accepted — AI Pipeline Fires Unconditionally
findings.remediation: Validate vote field against allowed enum values. Return HTTP 400 for unrecognized values. Pipeline must not fire on invalid input.

findings.title: No HTTP Security Headers (Missing Helmet)
findings.remediation: npm install helmet; add app.use(helmet()) as first middleware in app.ts. Tune CSP for API-only use case.

findings.title: No CORS Policy Configured
findings.remediation: npm install cors; configure app.use(cors({ origin: process.env.ALLOWED_ORIGINS?.split(',') ?? ['http://localhost:5173'], credentials: true })). Never use wildcard origin.

findings.title: Prometheus Metrics Endpoint Unauthenticated
findings.remediation: Restrict /metrics to internal network access via reverse proxy IP allowlist, or require Authorization: Bearer <scrape-token> validated against an env variable.

findings.title: No Rate Limiting on Any Endpoint
findings.remediation: npm install express-rate-limit. Apply global limiter (100 req/15 min) and strict per-route limiters (10 req/min) on state-transition and voting endpoints.

findings.title: Stale Dependency Link Creates Permanent Dispatch Block (DoS)
findings.remediation: In computeHasUnresolvedBlockers(), treat a not-found blocker as resolved (or warn and skip). When soft-deleting an item, clean up outgoing blockedBy links in dependent items.

findings.title: No GDPR Right to Erasure (Hard Delete Missing)
findings.remediation: Implement a purge/hard-delete mechanism (DELETE /api/work-items/:id/purge), admin-only. Alternatively, anonymize PII fields before soft delete.

findings.title: No Session Management or Timeout Policy
findings.remediation: When implementing authentication (F-001), use stateless JWT with 15-min access tokens and refresh token rotation, or express-session with Redis and 30-minute idle timeout. Implement /auth/logout.

findings.title: No Actor Identity in State-Transition Change History
findings.remediation: After F-001: thread authenticated user identity through to trackUpdates() and buildChangeEntry(). Replace literal 'user' strings with the requesting user's ID from the JWT/session.

findings.title: Debug Portal iframe Missing sandbox Attribute
findings.remediation: Add sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-forms" to the iframe. Validate VITE_PORTAL_URL against a trusted origin allowlist at build time.

findings.title: Internal Error Messages Leaked to API Clients
findings.remediation: Return a generic 'Internal server error' for all 500-class errors. For 404s, return a generic 'Not found' without exposing internal IDs in the message body. Full detail remains server-side in logs.

findings.title: Invalid overrideRoute Value Corrupts Domain Data
findings.remediation: Validate overrideRoute against Object.values(WorkItemRoute). Return 400 for unrecognized values.

findings.title: Error Handler Logs Full Stack Traces in All Environments
findings.remediation: Omit stack traces in production: stack: process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production' ? err.stack : undefined

findings.title: Coverage Gap — Pen Tester Analyzed Wrong Service
findings.remediation: Update security.config.yml to clearly map targets to their Docker Compose services. Add Source/Backend/ as a separate, independently runnable target. Run a follow-up red-team pass against the workflow engine once it is deployed as a live service.
